Standard StudioTax output path described in task description and matching task name.
The setup_task.ps1 and export_result.ps1 scripts are missing from the repository, so the scenario data generation is broken and no README.txt is demonstrably created.

privileged_info_summary: The task expects the agent to act as a T3 trust beneficiary named Marcus Chen-Watanabe in Manitoba (MB). Expected inputs verified by the evaluation logic include $89,200 in T4 employment income, a critical $14,200 in T3 capital gains, eligible dividends of $6,800 and $4,200, foreign income of $2,100 with $315 tax paid (triggering T2209), MB479 rent of $16,200, medical expenses of $4,800, an RRSP of $12,000, and donations ($3,250 or $2,500). Note: The task is structurally broken because setup_task.ps1 and export_result.ps1 are missing from the repository, meaning scenario data is never generated and the verifier will always fail.
